<!-- Pull Request Template: required fields for AI-assisted and manual PRs -->

## Summary
Provide a short description of the change and link to the related work item(s).

- Work Item / Issue: 
- Related PRs: 

## Implementation Screenshots (required for web coding agent PRs)
Include at least one screenshot showing the implemented UI state. For UI-impacting changes include an additional edge-state screenshot (error/empty/loading).

- Screenshot 1: (attach image)
- Screenshot 2 (edge state): (attach image) – optional but recommended for UI changes

## UI/UX Compliance (required for UI changes)
State whether this change complies with the repository UI/UX standard and reference the file:

- UI/UX standard referenced: `.github/UI-UX-GUIDELINES.md`
- Compliance status: [ ] Compliant  [ ] Not compliant (explain)
- If not compliant, provide justification and link to approval work item.

## Tests (required)
List the tests added or updated mapped to user story acceptance criteria. Provide commands to run them and a short statement of what they verify (outcome, not implementation).

- Unit tests: (files, command)
- Integration tests: (files, command)
- End-to-end tests: (files, command)

## README impact
Does this change require a README update? If yes, summarize the change and file(s to update.

- README impact: [ ] Yes  [ ] No
- If yes, files to update:

## Checklist (reviewers)
- [ ] Screenshots attached (web coding agent PRs)
- [ ] UI/UX compliance declared
- [ ] Tests added (unit/integration/e2e) and evidence provided
- [ ] README impact evaluated
- [ ] Product owner / brand manager sign-off attached (if UI changes)
